playbooks.name: Daily FR Report (N-1 + MTD)
outputs: Báo cáo FR N-1: Core / LH / SME / Bulky theo HAN-SGN-EXP

steps.title: Pull data FR raw từ data warehouse
steps.expected_output: File raw .csv chứa: order_id, region, service, status, driver_id
steps.watch_out: Check timezone GMT+7; loại order test/internal

steps.title: Tính FR theo lát cắt: region × service × driver_pool
steps.expected_output: Pivot table FR% N-1 và MTD
steps.watch_out: FR = success / (success+fail+cancel-by-driver), KHÔNG tính cancel-by-customer

steps.title: So sánh vs target + week-over-week
steps.expected_output: Heatmap: cell màu đỏ nếu < target -5pp
steps.watch_out: Loại noise: ngày lễ, sự kiện đặc biệt → flag riêng

steps.title: Drill insight: top 3 lý do Fail dominant
steps.expected_output: Bảng: lý do Fail × count × % share × driver pool
steps.watch_out: Phân biệt 'driver fault' vs 'system fault' vs 'customer fault'

steps.title: Gửi báo cáo trên kênh Truck Ops daily + flag escalation
steps.expected_output: Telegram message: TLDR + 3 actions cần làm hôm nay
steps.watch_out: Nếu FR drop >7pp 2 ngày liên tiếp → escalate G3 ngay 9:30

playbooks.escalation: G3 nếu FR drop >5pp 2 ngày liên tiếp; G4 nếu drop >10pp hoặc affect KR weekly

playbooks.name: Weekly Capacity Forecast
playbooks.frequency: Thứ 6 hàng tuần (T-2 trước tuần mới)
outputs: Capacity ước tính theo region × service × pool tuần T+1
Plan action: recruit / reactivate / shift policy

steps.title: Lấy active driver count tuần T (Mon-Sun) theo pool
steps.watch_out: Active = chạy ≥3 đơn trong 7 ngày; exclude xe đang sửa

steps.title: Áp productivity tier benchmark
steps.watch_out: Station >120/m, Core >65, Hub >40, Mass >30 — KHÔNG dùng avg đơn

steps.title: So với volume forecast (BD/Growth) tuần T+1
steps.watch_out: Hỏi BD/Growth update bằng số forecast LATEST, không stale

steps.title: Đề xuất action: recruit/reactivate/policy
steps.expected_output: Action list với cost ước tính + owner
steps.watch_out: Action cost > 200M → escalate G3 trước commit

steps.title: Trình G3 weekly meeting thứ 6 PM
steps.watch_out: G3 quyết action; G2 KHÔNG tự commit ngân sách

playbooks.escalation: G3 cho action >200M; G4 nếu gap >30% volume forecast

playbooks.name: Backlog Clearance (Backlog 4h)
outputs: Trend backlog daily for G3 review

steps.title: Pull backlog real-time theo zone, sort by age
steps.watch_out: Order >3h: priority cao; >4h: alert + auto-bonus check

steps.title: Match driver available trong zone (driver app status)
steps.watch_out: Driver đã reject 2 lần → skip, đẩy zone khác

steps.title: Gán đơn manual (nếu auto-dispatch fail) hoặc đẩy noti boost
steps.watch_out: Manual assign chỉ khi giá > base; log cost

steps.title: Fall-back: nếu sau 30 phút vẫn fail → contact S/O hoặc reschedule
steps.watch_out: Refund >100K/order → log để G3 review weekly

playbooks.escalation: G3 nếu backlog rate >10% 2 ngày; G4 nếu KR FR weekly impact

playbooks.name: Daily Driver Productivity & Retention Update
inputs: Target capacity tuần đã set thứ 2
outputs: Productivity actual N vs target (theo pool)
Retention: active today / total active tuần trước

steps.title: Pull driver active list hôm nay theo pool
steps.watch_out: 'Active' = login + có ≥1 đơn accept, KHÔNG chỉ login

steps.title: Tính productivity = orders/driver/day
steps.watch_out: Loại driver mới <7 ngày (productivity chưa stable)

steps.title: Retention rate = active today / active 7 ngày trước
steps.watch_out: Phân biệt D1/D7/D30 retention

steps.title: Update dashboard + post brief lên Telegram team channel
steps.expected_output: 3 dòng: actual vs target, top drop pool, action gợi ý
steps.watch_out: Drop >10pp → flag G2 để dive deeper trong ngày

playbooks.escalation: G2 nếu retention drop >10pp 1 tuần; G3 nếu kéo dài 2 tuần

playbooks.name: Inactive Driver Recovery Campaign

steps.title: Segment inactive list theo lý do (cost, app issue, alt income)
steps.watch_out: Đừng spam tất cả; segment trước, tailor message sau

steps.title: Tailor message + incentive theo segment
steps.expected_output: Template noti + boost incentive cụ thể
steps.watch_out: Boost > base income tier hiện tại → no-go; cost out of band

steps.title: Gửi noti push qua CRM + follow-up call (CTV / G1)
steps.watch_out: Call within 24h sau noti; quá 48h → conversion drop >50%

steps.title: Đo cost per reactivation + retention 7 ngày sau
steps.watch_out: Reactivate chỉ value nếu retention 7+ ngày; flush bounce cao

steps.title: Lessons-learned + propose tweak chính sách
steps.watch_out: Propose policy tweak nếu cost > 50K/driver → cần G3 sign-off

playbooks.escalation: G3 nếu cost recovery >100K/driver; G4 nếu policy thay đổi >2% budget

playbooks.name: Driver Recruitment Pipeline (Đội nhóm)
outputs: Funnel: lead → onboard → active → retain D30

steps.title: Map nguồn (team Growth, đội nhóm leader, referral, social)
steps.watch_out: Đội nhóm leader convert cao hơn social 3x

steps.title: Set up onboarding session (training, decal, app)
steps.watch_out: Onboard <48h sau apply; quá thì drop-off >40%

steps.title: Decal + app activation check
steps.watch_out: Decal phải verified ảnh; chấp nhận quan sát onsite

steps.title: Theo dõi D7 active rate
steps.watch_out: D7 <50% → channel kém; thử test channel mới

steps.title: Weekly review CAC với G2/G3
steps.watch_out: CAC > target 30% → halt channel; reassess

playbooks.escalation: G3 cho budget adjust; G4 cho expansion sang channel mới (paid acquisition)

playbooks.name: Vendor B2B Daily Dispatch

steps.title: Pull đơn B2B queue + vendor capacity
steps.watch_out: Check SLA window: missed SLA → cost penalty

steps.title: Assign vendor theo rule (cost/SLA/capacity)
steps.watch_out: Vendor reject 3x/tuần → flag G3 review

steps.title: Lập bảng kê chi phí daily theo dự án
steps.expected_output: Bảng kê: order × vendor × cost × project code
steps.watch_out: Cost match phụ lục giá; mismatch → flag Legal/G3

steps.title: Tracking SLA realtime + escalate khi miss
steps.watch_out: Miss SLA > 5%/ngày → G3 review vendor performance

playbooks.escalation: G3 cho vendor performance; G4 cho contract dispute >100M

playbooks.name: Vendor B2B Onboarding (New Vendor)

steps.title: Source vendor candidates (3-5 options)
steps.watch_out: Diverse region/service để giảm dependency

steps.title: RFP + negotiation pricing
steps.watch_out: Term payment 30-45 ngày; uptime/SLA penalty clause

steps.title: Legal review + sign contract
steps.watch_out: Legal review ≥3 ngày; KHÔNG sign without legal sign-off

steps.title: Tech integration: vendor account, system access, dispatch flow
steps.expected_output: Vendor có thể nhận đơn qua system
steps.watch_out: Test dispatch 5 đơn pilot trước go-live full

steps.title: Pilot 2 tuần + review KPI
steps.watch_out: Define KPI go/no-go từ ngày 1: accept rate ≥85%, SLA ≥90%

playbooks.escalation: G4 cho contract >500M VNĐ/năm; Legal cho clause non-standard

playbooks.name: Monthly Cost & Policy Planning

steps.title: Cost breakdown N: incentive / vendor / hub / ops
steps.watch_out: Variance >5% → root cause analysis bắt buộc

steps.title: Policy ROI review: incentive vs activation gain
steps.watch_out: ROI <1.5x → kill hoặc redesign policy

steps.title: Forecast cost N+1 dựa vol expected + policy mới
steps.watch_out: Base case dùng vol forecast confirmed; Bull/Bear chỉ sensitivity

steps.title: Trình G3 + adjust → G4 review monthly
steps.watch_out: G4 KHÔNG nên approve line item; review macro KPI

playbooks.escalation: G4 nếu cost plan >5% budget AOP; CFO nếu impact P&L

playbooks.name: Monthly FR Insight Analysis (Fail KPI Deep-dive)
outputs: Pattern theo driver pool × region × service

steps.title: Aggregate Fail data 4 tuần
steps.watch_out: Cleanse: bỏ test order, manual override

steps.title: Phân loại theo cause: driver / system / customer
steps.watch_out: Cause 'other' phải <10%; quá → fix taxonomy

steps.title: Drill driver pool × cause: ai fail nhiều và tại sao
steps.watch_out: Bottom 10% driver = 30-40% fail; target action vào nhóm này

steps.title: Đề xuất 3 action cho tháng N+1
steps.watch_out: Action phải đo lường được; KHÔNG vague

steps.title: Present G3 weekly + G4 monthly business review
steps.watch_out: Pyramid principle: conclusion first, supporting data sau

playbooks.escalation: G3 cho action plan; G4 nếu cần investment >100M

playbooks.name: QM Case Resolution (Mở khoá / Huỷ đơn)

steps.title: Intake case từ G1: driver_id + reason + evidence
steps.watch_out: Yêu cầu evidence (screenshot/log); reject nếu thiếu

steps.title: Review driver history + policy applicable
steps.watch_out: Driver repeat offender → escalate G3 trước decide

steps.title: Decide + log via QM tool
steps.watch_out: SLA decision <4h; quá → driver complaint

steps.title: Communicate driver + S/O
steps.watch_out: Driver dispute → 24h cooldown + G3 review

playbooks.escalation: G3 cho case có legal/PR risk; G4 cho case dispute > 2 lần

playbooks.name: Cross-team Feature/Data Request

steps.title: Articulate problem: who/what/impact
steps.watch_out: Không build feature wishlist; mỗi feature phải có impact metric

steps.title: Draft solution spec + acceptance criteria
steps.watch_out: Acceptance criteria phải đo lường được

steps.title: Pitch Tech/Product PM trong sprint planning
steps.watch_out: Priority phải sort theo ROI; pitch top 3 thôi, đừng spam

steps.title: Theo dõi implementation + UAT khi deliver
steps.watch_out: UAT trong 5 ngày sau deploy; bug critical → escalate ngay

playbooks.escalation: G3 cho priority dispute; G4 cho roadmap mới quarter+

playbooks.name: Hub / KCN Go-live Checklist

steps.title: Site survey: location, access, vendor proximity
steps.watch_out: Check competitor presence; if Grab/Be có hub gần → cost driver acq sẽ cao

steps.title: Lease + setup physical (decal station, signage, training room)
steps.watch_out: Lease ≥12 tháng; clause sublease nếu pilot fail

steps.title: Driver recruitment campaign onsite
steps.watch_out: Channel local (đội nhóm leader địa phương) > paid acq

steps.title: Tech integration: hub zone, dispatch rule, pricing
steps.watch_out: Test dispatch 50 đơn pilot trước public launch

steps.title: Soft launch 2 tuần + KPI review
steps.watch_out: KPI go/no-go: 50+ active driver, FR ≥60%, COGS within band

playbooks.escalation: G4 cho budget >500M, hub mới chưa precedent; CFO cho lease >12 tháng

playbooks.name: SLA Crisis Response (FR Drop / On-time Drop)

steps.title: Confirm crisis: FR drop pattern 2+ ngày, exclude noise
steps.watch_out: Đừng react theo 1 ngày data; check ngày lễ/event

steps.title: Form crisis room: G3 lead, G2 data, G1 driver outreach
steps.watch_out: Limit war room 3-5 người; quá đông slow decision

steps.title: Diagnose RCA: supply / demand / system / external
steps.watch_out: 5 Whys; root cause phải có evidence, không guess

steps.title: Action immediate: boost incentive / shift supply / pause cohort
steps.watch_out: Boost cost out-of-band → notify G4 same day

steps.title: Action structural: fix policy / system / vendor
steps.watch_out: Crisis chưa kết thúc tới khi structural fix live 5 ngày

steps.title: Post-mortem + update playbook
steps.watch_out: Post-mortem trong 7 ngày sau resolve; blameless

playbooks.escalation: G4 same day; CFO nếu cost impact >300M; PR nếu media risk

playbooks.name: Weekly Contribution Report (Đội nhóm)
outputs: % contribution đội nhóm vs mass theo service

steps.title: Tag order theo driver pool
steps.watch_out: Pool tag stable; nếu driver chuyển pool tuần đó → flag manual

steps.title: Tính % contribution per pool per service
steps.watch_out: Bulky đội nhóm thường >70%; nếu drop <60% → flag

steps.title: Trend WoW + top performer/dropper
steps.watch_out: Dropper >3 tuần liên tiếp → escalate G2 dive

steps.title: Brief G3 + post lên team channel thứ 2 sáng
steps.watch_out: Brief đầu tuần → G3 set action cho tuần mới

playbooks.escalation: G2 nếu pool đội nhóm drop >10pp; G3 nếu structural issue

playbooks.name: Shift Pilot Cohort Onboarding

steps.title: Recruit cohort (mix existing core + new sign-up)
steps.watch_out: Existing core driver phù hợp shift hơn newbie

steps.title: Training shift policy + app config
steps.watch_out: Quiz pass ≥80% trước go-live; quá thấp → retrain

steps.title: Live pilot 4 tuần + daily monitoring
steps.watch_out: Compliance check daily; rollback nếu <70% 1 tuần

steps.title: Retro + scale decision
steps.watch_out: Scale chỉ khi income uplift + retention proven 4 tuần

playbooks.escalation: G3 cho scale decision; G4 cho cohort >500 drivers

playbooks.name: Decal Verification Campaign

steps.title: List driver chưa decal active 14 ngày
steps.watch_out: Active 14 ngày = đáng đầu tư decal; inactive → skip

steps.title: Schedule decal session theo region
steps.watch_out: Session theo cụm địa lý để giảm travel time

steps.title: Onsite decal + verify photo
steps.watch_out: Photo phải rõ biển số + decal; mờ → re-do

steps.title: Update system + report weekly
steps.watch_out: Update trong ngày; lag dữ liệu làm KR sai

playbooks.escalation: G2 nếu cost > target 30%; G3 nếu vendor decal issue

playbooks.name: OKR Weekly Cascade Sync

steps.title: Pull OKR action status (on-track / at-risk / blocked)
steps.watch_out: At-risk định nghĩa: deadline trong 7 ngày + <50% progress

steps.title: 1:1 mini với G2/G1: blocker + need help
steps.expected_output: Blocker list resolved hoặc escalation plan
steps.watch_out: Không lecture; G3 listen + unblock

steps.title: Set top 3 priority tuần
steps.watch_out: Top 3 thôi; quá → diluted focus

steps.title: Brief G4 trong manager sync thứ 2 PM
steps.watch_out: G4 KHÔNG cần daily; weekly + escalation real-time

playbooks.escalation: G4 cho cross-team blocker, action at-risk >2 tuần
